description_long: This apartment building features a modern, L-shaped design with a flat roof and a combination of dark and light exterior facades. The front side showcases large windows and a main entrance, while the rear opens onto a spacious wooden deck with a central swimming pool, surrounded by lounge chairs and umbrellas. The building appears to have two stories, with the upper floor featuring regularly spaced windows overlooking the pool area. The property includes a paved driveway and parking spaces for several vehicles along one side. The landscaping is minimal, with green lawn areas flanking the structure and deck. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, L-shaped apartment building with a flat roof, large windows, and a central pool deck surrounded by lounge areas. The exterior features a mix of dark and light facades, with parking and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, dark facade, large windows, and parking area to the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the pool deck, lounge chairs, umbrellas, and upper-floor windows overlooking the pool.
description_view_2: Side view with a clear look at the pool, deck, and parking area, as well as the building's L-shaped layout.
description_view_3: Alternate front view emphasizing the dark facade, main entrance, and parking spaces in front of the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in horizontal rows, with evenly spaced groupings on both floors, especially prominent on the pool-facing side.
